mnemonics: FLUTE: Fairness, Liability, Usefulness, Transparency, Explainability
BIAS: Be Informed About Scrutiny (to remember scrutinizing algorithms for bias)
PROACT: Principles, Regulations, Oversight, Accountability, Compliance, Transparency
keyPoints: AI systems must be designed and deployed with fairness and non-discrimination as core principles.
Public policy must establish clear liability frameworks to determine responsibility when AI systems cause harm.
Transparency and explainability (XAI) are crucial for building public trust and ensuring regulatory compliance.
commonMistakes: Assuming technical excellence alone guarantees ethical outcomes.
Overlooking the societal and environmental costs of large AI models.
Treating ethics and policy as an afterthought rather than a foundational design requirement.
